title: Recall
body:
Adds a single item, the Recall Amulet, that let's you teleport back to your bed (in whatever dimension you are in). 

 

It also has the following config options:  

Max Damage - how often you can teleport  
Cast Time - How long it takes to use the item  
Play Sounds - Enable/Disable any sounds the item does  
Emit Particles - Enable/Disable any particles the item emits
